zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Seton於1449年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾西頓時，他的父親John Seton11歲，母親Christian Lindsay14歲。他於1474年9月14日與Lady Margaret Campbell在蘇格蘭可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1458年在蘇格蘭被列為privy counsellor (p.c.) 。他去世於1508年4月6日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾丁波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Seton于1449年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾西頓时，他的父亲John Seton11岁，母亲Christian Lindsay14岁。他于1474年9月14日与Lady Margaret Campbell在苏格兰可拉可曼南史爾多拉亞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1458年在苏格兰被列为privy counsellor (p.c.) 。他去世于1508年4月6日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓潘斯享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾丁波。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Seton was born in 1449, in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, his father, John Seton, was 11 and his mother, Christian Lindsay, was 14. He married Lady Margaret Campbell on 14 September 1474, in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1458, at the age of 9, his occupation is listed as privy counsellor (p.c.)  in Scotland. He died on 6 April 1508, in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 59, and was buried in Edinburgh, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Seton est né en 1449, à Seton, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, John Seton, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Christian Lindsay, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Campbell le 14 septembre 1474, à Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1458, à l’âge de 9 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est privy counsellor (p.c.)  à Écosse. Il est décédé le 6 avril 1508, à Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Edinburgh, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Seton 1449 in Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Seton 11 und seine Mutter Christian Lindsay 14. Er hat am 14. September 1474 in Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland Lady Margaret Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1458, als er 9 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als privy counsellor (p.c.)  in Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. April 1508 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Edinburgh, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Seton è nato il nel 1449 nel Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Seton, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Christian Lindsay, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Campbell il 14 settembre 1474, nel Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1458, all'età di 9 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come privy counsellor (p.c.)  nel Scotland. Morì il 6 aprile 1508, nel Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Edinburgh, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Setonが1449年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアセトンで生まれた時，父John Setonは11歳，母Christian Lindsayは14歳であった。1474年9月14日にスコットランドクラクマナンシュアイアドラーでLady Margaret Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1458年，9歳の時，スコットランドでの職業はprivy counsellor (p.c.) と記録されている。彼は1508年4月6日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンプアンスで59歳で死去し，スコットランドエディンブルグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Seton(이)가 1449년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 세턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Seton(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Lindsay(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1474년 9월 14일 스컷랜드 클랙먼아실르 돌라에서 Lady Margaret Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1458년, 9세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스컷랜드에서 privy counsellor (p.c.) 이었다. 그는 1508년 4월 6일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 플레스토파스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에딘버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Seton nasceu em 1449, em Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Seton, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Christian Lindsay, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Campbell em 14 de setembro de 1474, em Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1458, com 9 anos, sua profissão aparece como privy counsellor (p.c.)  em Scotland. Ele faleceu em 6 de abril de 1508, em Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Edinburgh, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Seton родился в 1449 г. в местности сетон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Seton было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Lindsay, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Campbell 14 сентября 1474 г. в местности доллар, клаккманнаньшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1458 году, в возрасте 9 лет,  он работал по профессии privy counsellor (p.c.)  в местности Шотландия. Он умер 6 апреля 1508 г. в местности престонпанс, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности эдинбург, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir George Seton nació en 1449, en Seton, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, John Seton, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Christian Lindsay, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Campbell el 14 de septiembre de 1474, en Dollar, Clackmannanshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1458, a la edad de 9 años, su ocupación registrada era privy counsellor (p.c.)  en Scotland. Murió el 6 de abril de 1508, en Prestonpans, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Edinburgh, Scotland.
